channel.title: Rhythm Games on Chasing Dings!
channel.description: Recent content in Rhythm Games on Chasing Dings!

item.title: The Transgressive Charm of Um Jammer Lammy
item.description: All “Jammer” Lammy wants to do is rock. The only thing stopping her is… everything.

item.title: Backlog Report: Is it worth buying a PS3 to play Mad Maestro?
item.description: Mad Maestro is a PS2 classical music rhythm game. Why would you need a PS3 to play it?

item.title: 21 Reactions: Chemical Chaos
item.description:
I asked OpenAI’s GPT-3 to generate 31 different videogame ideas, one for each day of Blaugust, each dealing in some way with that particular day of the month. Here’s its idea for August 21st: “21 Reactions: Chemical Chaos”.

Number: 21. Genre: Rhythm game. Title: “21 Grams”. Outline: In this rhythm game, you must keep the beat while 21 grams of various substances are added to a beaker. The challenge lies in ensuring that the mixture does not explode.

item.title: Two Weeks with Fitness Boxing 2 for the Switch
item.description: A decent light workout for those who enjoy rhythm games, but it won’t teach you much about boxing.
